---
title: "GI Surgical Oncology Didactics"
---

## Esophageal Cancer

[Acute Care of Esophageal Cancer](acs_gi_cancers.htm)

[Esophageal Perforation SCORE](esoph_perf.htm)

[Esophageal Cancer Lecture](eso_ca_rx_talk.htm)

[Esophageal Cancer Cases](eso_ca_cases.htm)

[Esophagectomy Postop Care](eso_postop_care.htm)

## Gastric Cancer

[Gastric Cancer Lecture](gastric_ca_rx_talk.htm)

[Gastric GIST](gist_slides.htm)

## Colorectal Cancer

[Rectal Cancer Adjuvant Therapy](rectal_adjuvant.htm)

[Colorectal Cancer Genetics](crc_genetics_slides.htm)
